title: Floral Craft Feather Butterflies Pack of 12 - Butterfly on Wire Stems (10cm Pink x 12)
features: Inerra Brand. Pack of 12 Feather Butterflies on wires
Each feather butterfly features a 20cm wire stem for inserting into floral arrangements, craft displays or as a decorative item.
description: Each pack features 12 Feather Butterflies. Various styles and sizes available.
